moments.title: FIFA World Cup Quarter-Finals Begin
moments.blurb: The 2026 FIFA World Cup, hosted across North America, enters the high-stakes Quarter-Finals stage today, running until July 11, with teams battling for a spot in the Semi-Finals.

angles.name: Quarter-Finals Kick Off
angles.copy: It's Quarter-Finals day at the FIFA World Cup! Who are you backing to make it through to the semis?

angles.name: Road to the Semis
angles.copy: The biggest football tournament on the planet is down to the final eight. Every game is now a final. Who's got the nerves to go all the way?

moments.title: Wimbledon Singles Semi-Finals
moments.blurb: Wimbledon 2026 continues today with the Gentlemen's and Ladies' Singles Semi-Finals, setting the stage for the weekend's finals.

angles.name: Centre Court Drama
angles.copy: It's Semi-Finals day at Wimbledon! Who will secure their spot in the coveted singles finals this weekend?

angles.name: Almost Finals
angles.copy: The grass court glory is almost within reach. Today, we find out who makes it to the final dance at Wimbledon.

moments.title: UK Heatwave Continues, Peaks This Week
moments.blurb: The UK is experiencing its third heatwave of 2026, with temperatures expected to peak at 35-36°C in parts of England today and tomorrow, prompting health warnings.

angles.name: Staying Cool
angles.copy: Another scorcher today! Temperatures are set to peak at 35-36°C in some areas. Remember to stay hydrated and keep cool.

angles.name: Heatwave Advice
angles.copy: It's the third heatwave of the year, and health warnings are in place. Check on vulnerable friends and family, and stay safe in the sun.

moments.title: Llangollen International Musical Eisteddfod
moments.blurb: The Llangollen International Musical Eisteddfod continues in North Wales until July 12, featuring a diverse program of music and culture, including performances by Emeli Sandé and Michael Ball.

angles.name: Eisteddfod Spirit
angles.copy: The Llangollen International Musical Eisteddfod is in full swing! Celebrating music and culture from around the world right here in Wales.

angles.name: Emeli Sandé Live
angles.copy: Emeli Sandé takes to the stage at Llangollen Eisteddfod tomorrow, followed by Michael Ball on Saturday! Who's excited?

moments.title: Exmouth Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The free family-focused Exmouth Festival runs from July 9-12, bringing live music, theatre, circus, and art to various outdoor locations in Exmouth, Devon.

angles.name: Festival Fun in Exmouth
angles.copy: Exmouth Festival is ON! Get ready for four days of free music, theatre, and family fun across town. What are you checking out first?

angles.name: Wild Things in Devon
angles.copy: This year's Exmouth Festival theme is 'Wild Things'! Expect incredible local talent and plenty of surprises by the sea. Don't miss it!

moments.title: Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival
moments.blurb: Birmingham's Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival kicks off tomorrow, July 10, running until July 12 in Moseley Park, featuring a diverse lineup of groundbreaking UK and international acts.

angles.name: Birmingham's Groove
angles.copy: Getting ready to groove? The Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival starts tomorrow in Birmingham! Who are you excited to see?

angles.name: Weekend Vibes
angles.copy: Three days of groundbreaking music in Moseley Park. Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival is bringing the vibes this weekend!

moments.title: Little House on the Prairie Drops on Netflix
moments.blurb: A new adaptation of the beloved classic 'Little House on the Prairie', based on Laura Ingalls Wilder's books, premieres globally on Netflix today.

angles.name: New Prairie Adventures
angles.copy: Travel back to the American West! 'Little House on the Prairie' gets a brand new adaptation on Netflix today. Perfect for family viewing!

angles.name: Nostalgia Watch
angles.copy: Who grew up with 'Little House on the Prairie'? The timeless story is back with a fresh take, streaming now on Netflix.

moments.title: RNLI Issues Wales Beach Safety Warning
moments.blurb: The RNLI is warning beachgoers in Wales to be cautious this week due to warm weather and offshore winds, advising against using inflatables at westerly-facing coastlines.

angles.name: Stay Safe on Welsh Beaches
angles.copy: Planning a trip to the Welsh coast? The RNLI is urging caution due to offshore winds and warm weather. Head to a lifeguarded beach!

angles.name: Paddleboarders Beware
angles.copy: RNLI warning for paddleboarders in Wales: offshore winds can quickly sweep you out to sea. Check conditions or ask a lifeguard before you go.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Courtney Love
moments.blurb: Iconic Hole frontwoman and rock legend Courtney Love turns 62 today.

angles.name: Rock Icon's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 62nd Birthday to the one and only Courtney Love! What's your favourite Hole track?

angles.name: 90s Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating the birthday of a true 90s icon, Courtney Love! Sending love to the Hole frontwoman on her 62nd.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Jack White
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning musician, producer, and White Stripes founder Jack White celebrates his 51st birthday today.

angles.name: Guitar Hero Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to the incredible Jack White! From The White Stripes to his solo work, a true guitar hero.

angles.name: Rock Genius
angles.copy: Celebrating the birthday of rock genius Jack White! What's your go-to White Stripes anthem?

moments.title: Transport for Wales Heatwave Travel Advice
moments.blurb: Transport for Wales has issued travel advice and ticket easements for July 10-11 due to the ongoing heatwave and planned industrial action affecting services between Shrewsbury and Birmingham.

angles.name: TfW Travel Alert
angles.copy: Travelling with Transport for Wales this weekend? Be aware of heatwave advice and service changes, especially between Shrewsbury and Birmingham. Check before you travel!

angles.name: Stay Hydrated on Trains
angles.copy: With the heatwave peaking, Transport for Wales advises carrying water and allowing extra time if travelling on their network. Stay safe out there.

moments.title: Exeter Craft Festival on Cathedral Green
moments.blurb: The 2026 Exeter Craft Festival takes place from July 9-11 on Cathedral Green, showcasing a variety of crafts, art, and entertainment.

angles.name: Crafts on the Green
angles.copy: The Exeter Craft Festival is back on Cathedral Green today through Saturday! Discover unique art and crafts from local makers.

angles.name: Support Local Artists
angles.copy: Fancy a browse? The Exeter Craft Festival is a fantastic opportunity to see and buy work from talented local artists and artisans. Go check it out!

moments.title: Sir Bryn Terfel Debuts at Llangollen Eisteddfod
moments.blurb: Global opera star Sir Bryn Terfel is making his festival debut at the Llangollen International Musical Eisteddfod, currently running until July 12.

angles.name: Opera Star in Wales
angles.copy: A major musical coup for Wales! Sir Bryn Terfel is making his debut at the Llangollen International Musical Eisteddfod this week. Don't miss this historic moment!

angles.name: Cultural Highlight
angles.copy: One of the world's greatest opera singers, Sir Bryn Terfel, is performing at the Llangollen Eisteddfod. A true highlight for Welsh culture.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Missy Elliott
moments.blurb: Groundbreaking rapper, singer, and producer Missy Elliott turns 55 on July 14.

angles.name: Queen of Hip-Hop
angles.copy: Get ready to 'Work It'! The legendary Missy Elliott celebrates her 55th birthday on July 14. What's your favourite Missy track?

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: A huge early birthday shoutout to the iconic Missy Elliott, turning 55 on Sunday! Her influence on music is undeniable.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Brian May
moments.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist and songwriter, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday on July 19.

angles.name: Queen Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Rock royalty alert! The incomparable Brian May of Queen celebrates his 79th birthday on July 19. What's your favourite May guitar solo?

angles.name: Bohemian Rhapsody's Architect
angles.copy: An early cheers to Brian May, turning 79 next Friday! The man behind some of Queen's greatest riffs and anthems.
